sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 185 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.231/2018 2. For hearing of main case 01.12.2025 Jam Zeeshan Ali, advocate for the applicant This matter is pending since 2018 without any progress. On 06.11.2020, following order was passed: “06.11.2020 Ms. Komal Anwar, adv. Holding brief for Jam Zeeshan, adv. for applicant, who is reportedly busy before another bench, however, requests for time to reformulate the question Two weeks’ time is granted to do the needful, however, subject to all just exceptions” Today no reformulated questions of law are placed on record and no justification is articulated before this court. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
